ab: Kacaw, mapawan kako to sasorit ako, pacaliwen ho^ kako to no miso haw?
ch: W:Kacaw，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Kacaw, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Awaa:y ko no mako, o ni Panay kinian.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Panay’s.

ab: Pacaliwen ho^ kako ri, panokasen ako anoho:ni^.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: Hayda, ini.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Aray, sowal hato ci Panay.
en: Thank you and thank Panay for me.

ab: O maan to haca^?
en: May I help you?

ab: Mamipanokas kako tonini a codad tosa^.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Hayda, o maan to haca^?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: Caliwen haca^ ako kina codad tolo^.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Nga’ay to. Nika panokasen i rikor no tolo^ a romi’ad.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: Caay ho^ panokas kiso to sasisit ako.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: Mapanokas to ako inacila^ kiya.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Talacowa^ to aca^ koya sasisit ako?
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了?
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Pacaliwen iso ci Kacaw kiya!
en: Did you lend it to Kacaw?

ab: Caay ka fana’ kako. Tengilaw ho^ ako ciira.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Pali’ayawen ako pacaliw kiso to no mako.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Panay, o nipacaliwan ni Kacaw kora ngayto^ i tisowanan haw?
en: Panay, did Kacaw lend you this coat?

ab: Caay, o nicakayananan ni ina^ ako.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: O malecaday kora ngayto^ ni Kacaw ato no miso haw?
en: Kacaw’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: O kohetingay ko niira, caay ka lecad ko cengel no niyam.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Panay, na micaliw kiso to payso^ i ci Kacawan haw?
en: Panay, did you borrow money from Kacaw?

ab: Hay, kona anini^ kako a panokas i ciiraan, nika mapawan kako a miala^ to payso^.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: Anohacowa^ to aca^ kiso a panokas?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Panokas hato ako i ciiraan anocila^.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: Hay, pasowal hato ako ci Kacaw.
en: Okay, I will tell Kacaw for you.
